home.hero_subtitle: Production-grade AI solution plays with Azure, built on the FAI Protocol. Every play ships with agents, instructions, skills, evaluation, and infrastructure-as-code.
home.feature_1_desc: Production-ready AI architectures covering RAG, agents, voice AI, document processing, and 20+ industry verticals.
home.feature_2_desc: The missing glue between agents, instructions, skills, hooks, and workflows. Auto-wiring primitives into solution plays.
home.feature_3_desc: Every play ships with builder/reviewer/tuner agents, evaluation pipeline, Bicep IaC, and MCP integration.
home.feature_4_desc: Every primitive aligns with Reliability, Security, Cost, Ops Excellence, Performance, and Responsible AI.
